nodes.label: daemon-runner: Go binary PID 1 in claude-user-sandbox, ~5-10 MB
nodes.norm_label: daemon-runner: go binary pid 1 in claude-user-sandbox, ~5-10 mb

nodes.label: .daemons.yaml: manifest file for daemon registration, limit 3 per user
nodes.norm_label: .daemons.yaml: manifest file for daemon registration, limit 3 per user

nodes.label: OOM policy: 3 crashes in 10 min → stop daemon + notify user + notify owner
nodes.norm_label: oom policy: 3 crashes in 10 min → stop daemon + notify user + notify owner

nodes.label: scripts/firewall/*: iptables egress rules — block port 25, rate-limit 465/587, 20GB/day + tc throttle
nodes.norm_label: scripts/firewall/*: iptables egress rules — block port 25, rate-limit 465/587, 20gb/day + tc throttle

nodes.label: scripts/monitoring/*: docker stats every minute, 60-point history, alert if avg >70% for 1hr
nodes.norm_label: scripts/monitoring/*: docker stats every minute, 60-point history, alert if avg >70% for 1hr

nodes.label: --restart=unless-stopped: containers survive host reboot and docker daemon restart
nodes.norm_label: --restart=unless-stopped: containers survive host reboot and docker daemon restart

nodes.label: Rationale: 3 daemon limit per user aligns with future Базовый=1/Профи=3/Студия=10 tiers
nodes.norm_label: rationale: 3 daemon limit per user aligns with future базовыи=1/профи=3/студия=10 tiers

nodes.label: Design decision: no user-hosted sites on proboi.site infrastructure — legal risk 149-ФЗ
nodes.norm_label: design decision: no user-hosted sites on proboi.site infrastructure — legal risk 149-фз

nodes.label: Mental model shift: container = ephemeral workspace → personal 24/7 slot
nodes.norm_label: mental model shift: container = ephemeral workspace → personal 24/7 slot

nodes.label: Network policy: block port 25 (SMTP), allow 465/587 rate-limited, HTTP/HTTPS open
nodes.norm_label: network policy: block port 25 (smtp), allow 465/587 rate-limited, http/https open

nodes.label: koen-assistant migration: systemd on host → inside container 946882308 under daemon-runner
nodes.norm_label: koen-assistant migration: systemd on host → inside container 946882308 under daemon-runner

nodes.label: pause/stop container skip when .daemons.yaml has enabled:true daemons
nodes.norm_label: pause/stop container skip when .daemons.yaml has enabled:true daemons

nodes.label: ROADMAP: Claude Code Features for Proboi bot (5 features)
nodes.norm_label: roadmap: claude code features for proboi bot (5 features)

nodes.label: Feature 1: Plan Mode — pre-execution plan with PLAN_START/PLAN_END markers and confirm/cancel/clarify buttons
nodes.norm_label: feature 1: plan mode — pre-execution plan with plan_start/plan_end markers and confirm/cancel/clarify buttons

nodes.label: Feature 2: Todo-list — live progress tracking with TODO_LIST_START/TODO_ITEM/TODO_START/TODO_DONE markers
nodes.norm_label: feature 2: todo-list — live progress tracking with todo_list_start/todo_item/todo_start/todo_done markers

nodes.label: Feature 3: Context compaction — auto-summarize old messages when approaching token limit
nodes.norm_label: feature 3: context compaction — auto-summarize old messages when approaching token limit

nodes.label: Feature 4: Guest memory — persistent session summaries in /opt/vault/{userId}/memory/
nodes.norm_label: feature 4: guest memory — persistent session summaries in /opt/vault/{userid}/memory/

nodes.label: Feature 5: Redirect interrupt — !<text> aborts current execution and relaunches with new instruction
nodes.norm_label: feature 5: redirect interrupt — !<text> aborts current execution and relaunches with new instruction

nodes.label: Plan Mode: AbortController stops stream after PLAN_END, plan stored in pendingPlan
nodes.norm_label: plan mode: abortcontroller stops stream after plan_end, plan stored in pendingplan

nodes.label: StreamingState extended: todoMessageId + todoItems array with pending/in_progress/done
nodes.norm_label: streamingstate extended: todomessageid + todoitems array with pending/in_progress/done

nodes.label: parseTodoMarkers(chunk, state): parses TODO_LIST_START/TODO_START/TODO_DONE in stream
nodes.norm_label: parsetodomarkers(chunk, state): parses todo_list_start/todo_start/todo_done in stream

nodes.label: estimateContextSize(): reads sessionFile, counts JSON bytes, approximates tokens
nodes.norm_label: estimatecontextsize(): reads sessionfile, counts json bytes, approximates tokens

nodes.label: compactSession(): summarizes old messages via LLM, replaces with summary block, rewrites sessionFile
nodes.norm_label: compactsession(): summarizes old messages via llm, replaces with summary block, rewrites sessionfile

nodes.label: buildSummaryPrompt(): prompt for summarizing dialog history, max 2000 words
nodes.norm_label: buildsummaryprompt(): prompt for summarizing dialog history, max 2000 words

nodes.label: Guest memory structure: /opt/vault/{userId}/memory/ with index.json, sessions/, facts.json, MEMORY.md
nodes.norm_label: guest memory structure: /opt/vault/{userid}/memory/ with index.json, sessions/, facts.json, memory.md

nodes.label: saveSessionMemory(): called on session end, generates summary, appends to day file, rebuilds MEMORY.md
nodes.norm_label: savesessionmemory(): called on session end, generates summary, appends to day file, rebuilds memory.md

nodes.label: injectMemoryContext(): reads MEMORY.md, injects as first system message if >50 chars
nodes.norm_label: injectmemorycontext(): reads memory.md, injects as first system message if >50 chars

nodes.label: rebuildMemoryMd(): builds readable MEMORY.md from last 14 days sessions + facts, max 50KB
nodes.norm_label: rebuildmemorymd(): builds readable memory.md from last 14 days sessions + facts, max 50kb

nodes.label: savePartialContext(): appends partial assistant response to sessionFile on abort
nodes.norm_label: savepartialcontext(): appends partial assistant response to sessionfile on abort

nodes.label: Stream marker ring buffer: last N chars buffered to detect markers split across chunks
nodes.norm_label: stream marker ring buffer: last n chars buffered to detect markers split across chunks

nodes.label: Telegram editMessageText debounce: max 1 edit/second per message
nodes.norm_label: telegram editmessagetext debounce: max 1 edit/second per message

nodes.label: Rationale: compaction is top priority because sessions break NOW — only existing-bug fix in the roadmap
nodes.norm_label: rationale: compaction is top priority because sessions break now — only existing-bug fix in the roadmap

nodes.label: Session 2026-05-12: tier awareness + guest menu + simplified /status (fb4a117)
nodes.norm_label: session 2026-05-12: tier awareness + guest menu + simplified /status (fb4a117)

nodes.label: Technical debt backlog (atomic writes, race conditions, reconciliation)
nodes.norm_label: technical debt backlog (atomic writes, race conditions, reconciliation)

nodes.label: Metering bugs H1/H2/H3 (token loss on ask-user, stop, memory analyzer)
nodes.norm_label: metering bugs h1/h2/h3 (token loss on ask-user, stop, memory analyzer)

nodes.label: Rationale: per-user containerEnabled takes priority over tier config
nodes.norm_label: rationale: per-user containerenabled takes priority over tier config

nodes.label: Rationale: LXCFS fallback needed for kernel 6.8.0-90 read-only container restriction
nodes.norm_label: rationale: lxcfs fallback needed for kernel 6.8.0-90 read-only container restriction

nodes.norm_label: rationale: compaction resets sessionid + summary injection because sdk hides messages[]
